description: Qinhuai River water sightseeing experience, admire the ancient architecture and night views along the banks, and feel the charm of the Six Dynasties ancient capital.
Showcasing Nanjing Yunjin brocade, an intangible cultural heritage, where visitors can observe the Yunjin weaving craftsmanship.
The mausoleum of Zhu Yuanzhang, the founding emperor of the Ming Dynasty, a UNESCO World Heritage Site and a model of Ming and Qing imperial tombs in China.
The residence of Chiang Kai-shek and Soong Mei-ling, featuring French architectural style, known as the "No. 1 Villa in the Far East."
A double-helix scenic pedestrian bridge over the Yangtze River, a modern architectural landmark offering views of the river and city skyline.
A famous food district in Nanjing, gathering various local snacks and night market delicacies, providing an authentic taste of Nanjing.
China's largest imperial garden lake, known as the "Pearl of Jinling," offering different scenery in all four seasons.
The most bustling commercial center in Nanjing, offering shopping, dining, and entertainment all in one place.
A famous snack street in Nanjing, featuring authentic local delicacies and a popular food destination recommended by locals.
The mausoleum of Dr. Sun Yat-sen, the founding father of the Republic of China, and the core attraction of the Zhongshan Scenic Area.
